allowed_files_raw: app/demo/**, components/demo/**, lib/demo/**, tests/e2e/demo-route.spec.ts, tailwind.config.js, package.json, package-lock.json, SESSION_HISTORY.md
forbidden_files_raw: FOLDERA_PRODUCTION_BACKLOG.md, app/page.tsx, app/HomePageClient.tsx, app/dashboard/**, components/foldera/**, lib/briefing/**, scripts/**
required_local_proof: Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npm run build; npm run lint; $env:PLAYWRIGHT_WEB_PORT='3018'; npx playwright test tests/e2e/demo-route.spec.ts --reporter=list
required_browser_proof: $env:PLAYWRIGHT_WEB_PORT='3020'; npx playwright test tests/e2e/public-routes.spec.ts --grep "landing demo uses neutral public copy and default approve language" --reporter=list
anti_regression_checks: the landing page route and copy must remain unchanged
the production dashboard route must remain unchanged
the Lovable demo styling must stay isolated to /demo
next_command: Push the verified /demo transplant to main.
